title: ka'ah #3512
definition:
1) to be sad, be disheartened, be cowed
    1a) (Niphal) to be disheartened, be cowed
    1b) (Hiphil) to make sad
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be sad, be disheartened, be cowed
    1a) (Niphal) to be disheartened, be cowed
    1b) (Hiphil) to make sad

    NASB:  to be disheartened or timid
